title: Codeograph Run Manifest
description: Entry point for all Codeograph output. Always read manifest.json first — it carries schema versions and sha256 digests for every artefact. Consumers must reject artefacts whose digest does not match.

schema_version.description: Semver of the manifest schema itself (this file). Bump when manifest structure changes.

codeograph_version.description: Version of the codeograph tool that produced this manifest.

artefacts.description: Per-artefact metadata keyed by artefact name. Both graph and llm_annotations are always present; llm_annotations sha256 is null when --ast-only was used.

llm_annotations.description: Non-deterministic LLM enrichment layer (out/llm-annotations.json). sha256 is null when produced with --ast-only.

path.description: Relative path from the output directory root.

schema_version.description: Semver of this artefact's own schema at time of production.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the artefact's canonical bytes. Null only for llm_annotations when --ast-only was used.
